description: Create a forensic eyewitness lineup experiment in PsychoPy Builder. The experiment consists of an 'Encoding' routine displaying 'suspect.jpg' for 3.0 seconds with the text 'Study the suspect', followed by a 5.0-second 'Delay' routine. The final 'Lineup' routine must present a simultaneous 2-row by 3-column grid of 6 faces (suspect.jpg and foil_1.jpg through foil_5.jpg) for participant selection via mouse click. The experiment must record the name of the clicked face and only accept clicks on the images themselves. Use assets from /home/ga/Documents/TaskData/faces/ and save the experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/eyewitness/lineup_task.psyexp.
